caption: The video begins with a white screen featuring the logo "IDEASBOX" in multi-colored and grey lettering. The scene then transitions to another white screen displaying various organizational logos under the heading "With the support of". These include the "AS FOUNDATION" logo, "ASSOCIATION PIERRE BELLON" with the subtext "Agir pour le développement humain", the "MAIRIE DE PARIS" logo, and the official emblem of the "RÉPUBLIQUE FRANÇAISE" with the text "Liberté • Égalité • Fraternité" and "MINISTÈRE DES AFFAIRES ÉTRANGÈRES". The sequence then moves to a white screen stating "In partnership with", featuring the logos for "S+ARCK®" and "UNHCR The UN Refugee Agency". Finally, the video ends on a plain white screen centered with the website address "www.ideas-box.org". No people or physical settings are visible throughout the sequence.
